name: Fu Xuan
desc: Head of the Divination Commission on the Luofu.\nThe person who uses the third eye and Matrix of Prescience to foretell the route of Xianzhou and the outcomes of events.

1.name: Dominus Pacis
1.desc: The Knowledge effect increases CRIT DMG by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

2.name: Optimus Felix
2.desc: If any ally target is struck by a killing blow while "Matrix of Prescience" is active, then all ally targets who were struck by a killing blow during this action will not be <u>knocked down</u>, and <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of their Max HP is immediately restored. This effect can trigger 1 time per battle.

10000007.name: Downed State
10000007.desc: An ally will be incapacitated once their HP is reduced to 0.

3.name: Apex Nexus
3.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

4.name: Fortuna Stellaris
4.desc: When other allies under Matrix of Prescience are attacked, Fu Xuan regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy.

5.name: Arbiter Primus
5.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

6.name: Omnia Vita
6.desc: Once Matrix of Prescience is activated, it will keep a tally of the total HP lost by all team members in the current battle. The DMG dealt by Fu Xuan's Ultimate will increase by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of this tally of HP loss.\nThis tally is also capped at <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of Fu Xuan's Max HP and the tally value will reset and re-accumulate after Fu Xuan's Ultimate is used.

120801.name: Novaburst
120801.desc: Deals Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Fu Xuan's Max HP to one designated enemy.
120801.simple_desc: Deals minor Quantum DMG to one enemy.

120802.name: Known by Stars, Shown by Hearts
120802.desc: Activates Matrix of Prescience, via which Fu Xuan's teammates will <u>Distribute</u> <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the DMG they receive (before this DMG is mitigated by any Shields) to Fu Xuan for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s).\nWhile affected by Matrix of Prescience, all ally targets gain the Knowledge effect, which increases their respective Max HP by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Fu Xuan's Max HP, and increases CRIT Rate by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[f1]%</unbreak></color>.\nWhen Fu Xuan is <u>knocked down</u>, the Matrix of Prescience will be dispelled.
120802.simple_desc: Activates Matrix of Prescience. <color=#f29e38ff>DMG received by Fu Xuan's teammates is <u>Distributed</u></color> to her. Also <color=#f29e38ff>increases CRIT Rate</color> and Max HP of all allies.

10000007.name: Downed State
10000007.desc: An ally will be incapacitated once their HP is reduced to 0.

10000013.name: Distribute
10000013.desc: Before DMG is calculated, distribute a part of the attacking unit's DMG to another target (or multiple other targets), with the target hit by the attack taking the rest of the DMG. DMG distributed to other targets cannot be distributed again.

120803.name: Woes of Many Morphed to One
120803.desc: Deals Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Fu Xuan's Max HP to all enemies and obtains 1 trigger count for the HP Restore effect granted by Fu Xuan's Talent.
120803.simple_desc: Deals Quantum DMG to all enemies and increases Fu Xuan's Talent trigger count.

120804.name: Bleak Breeds Bliss
120804.desc: While Fu Xuan is still active in combat, Misfortune Avoidance is applied to the entire team. With Misfortune Avoidance, allies take <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color> less DMG.\nWhen Fu Xuan's current HP percentage falls to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of her Max HP or less, HP Restore will be triggered for Fu Xuan, restoring her HP by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of the amount of HP she is currently missing. This effect cannot be triggered if she receives a killing blow. This effect has 1 trigger count by default and can hold up to a maximum of 2 trigger counts.
120804.simple_desc: While Fu Xuan is still active in combat, the DMG taken by all team members is reduced.\nWhen her HP is low, <color=#f29e38ff>automatically</color> <color=#f29e38ff>restores her own HP</color> based on the HP percentage already lost. This effect can have up to 2 trigger counts at any given time.

120806.name: Attack
120806.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

120807.name: Of Fortune Comes Fate
120807.desc: After the Technique is used, all team members receive a Barrier, lasting for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> seconds. This Barrier can block all enemy attacks, and the team will not enter combat when attacked. Entering battle while the Barrier is active will have Fu Xuan automatically activate Matrix of Prescience at the start of the battle, lasting for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
120807.simple_desc: Activates a Barrier. Allies will not enter combat when attacked by enemies. Entering battle will automatically activate Matrix of Prescience.

1.point_desc: When Matrix of Prescience is active, Fu Xuan will regenerate <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> extra Energy when she uses her Skill.
When Fu Xuan's Ultimate is used, heals all other allies by an amount equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of Fu Xuan's Max HP plus <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>.

If a target enemy applies <u>Crowd Control debuffs</u> to allies while the "Matrix of Prescience" is active, all allies will resist all <u>Crowd Control debuffs</u> applied by the enemy target during the current action. This effect can only be triggered once. When "Matrix of Prescience" is activated again, the number of times this effect can be triggered will reset.

10000011.name: Crowd Control debuff
10000011.desc: Freeze, Entanglement, Imprisonment, Dominance, Outrage, Strong Reverberation, Alien Dream, Snarelock, Terrified, Action Lock, Happiness Puppet, Grudge Ablaze.
